microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **global partner validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built and owned the **operating model** for Azure's Resilience Automation Platform, defining RACI structures, milestone tracking, and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable cross-functional motion.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** at a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new governance model for continuous partner-facing validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating alignment across regional and global stakeholders across multiple time zones.

Drove preparation and follow-up for recurring executive-level program reviews — managing agendas, escalation paths, KPI dashboards, and action-item tracking to ensure consistent **stakeholder alignment** and on-time milestone delivery across all partner workstreams.

Scaled team leverage through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly improving partner activation speed and program throughput.

Identified organizational capability gaps and internal resourcing requirements across partner-facing teams, translating findings into a structured **30/60/90-day execution roadmap** with clear owners, milestones, and governance checkpoints to accelerate the partner motion.
microsoft_2023: Championed **partner adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** — building repeatable activation assets used beyond the internship.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ structured interviews** with Azure service teams, synthesizing capability gaps into a prioritized backlog of partner-facing features aligned to real co-build use cases.

Improved **program operational efficiency** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting cross-team lookup time by 83% and reducing friction in the partner enablement workflow.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — building consensus across a lean, distributed stakeholder environment with competing priorities.

Built a structured **partner operations playbook** to reduce launch toil, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region and delivering a roadmap to automate critical execution paths used in future region launches.

Engineered a **Power BI performance dashboard** to track operational toil and milestone progress across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and report program outcomes in recurring executive-level updates.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and maintaining a live RACI and risk log to keep regional and engineering teams aligned throughout execution.

Facilitated **Agile ceremonies** — including sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilizing the developer intake process by enforcing structured milestone tracking and clear workstream ownership across cross-functional teams.

Drove **strategic alignment** between IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable governance cadence for future cross-org program rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by operationalizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process — building the repeatable operational infrastructure needed to scale partner-facing execution with minimal overhead.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align outreach with buyer intent — mirroring co-sell motion best practices at a small-business scale.

Strengthened leadership decision-making by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, translating findings into a revised pricing model and a prioritized roadmap of operational improvements tied to measurable revenue outcomes.
